hero.description: Revolutionize your farming with AI-powered crop recommendations, yield predictions, and disease detection. Make data-driven decisions for sustainable agriculture.

features.title: Comprehensive Farming Solutions
features.subtitle: Everything you need to make informed decisions and maximize your agricultural productivity

crop_recommendation.title: Crop Recommendation
crop_recommendation.description: AI-powered suggestions based on soil nutrients, weather conditions, and market demand to optimize your crop selection.

yield_prediction.title: Yield Prediction
yield_prediction.description: Accurate forecasting of crop yields using machine learning models trained on historical data and environmental factors.

disease_detection.title: Disease Detection
disease_detection.description: Computer vision technology to identify plant diseases early, with treatment recommendations and prevention strategies.

crop_planning.title: Crop Planning
crop_planning.description: Interactive calendar and timeline management for sowing, irrigation, fertilization, and harvesting schedules.

price_tracking.title: Price Tracking
price_tracking.description: Real-time market price analysis with trends and sell/buy recommendations for optimal profit margins.

weather_monitoring.title: Weather Monitoring
weather_monitoring.description: Localized weather forecasts, severe weather alerts, and climate data integration for better planning.

organic_farming.title: Organic Farming Guide
organic_farming.description: Comprehensive guides and recommendations for sustainable, organic farming practices and eco-friendly solutions.

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: Multilingual chatbot with voice support to answer farming questions and provide personalized guidance.

demo.description: Experience the power of AI-driven agriculture with our interactive demo
